name: Tammy Jo
text: I rarely write reviews, but this made such a huge difference. My lab had constant scratching and dull fur. After a few weeks, she looks healthier, calmer, and sleeps through the night again.

name: Debra Lynn Collins
text: I was skeptical at first, but this actually works. My senior dog is more active in the mornings, his coat is noticeably softer, and he seems much more comfortable overall.

name: Karen Whitfield
text: We've tried so many options and this is the first one that gave real results. The scratching has almost completely stopped and she looks happier every single day.
